title: me: what are you working on? founder: we're building the emotional friend that everyone needs, but with embedded graph based composable memory that can connect to claude code/openai with mcp/api/cli. it has it's own rl environment it uses to continuously update it's own model and can build a full web/mobile app, identify your target audience, do outreach, find you a girlfriend, buy her gifts, arrange your wedding, and raise your kids
